about.info: Why the hell write something about yourself here when the projects will tell you everything and even show you much better?

alexey-mozgunov.name: Alexey Mozgunov
alexey-mozgunov.text: Thanks to Nikita for the prompt creation of the site. The task was completed within the agreed time frame. The site turned out to be light and high-quality according to modern trends and requirements, which is important for it's SEO promotion.
